basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Deputy Director Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website of NIT Raipur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Raipur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Professor with minimum 5 years experience, Experience in administrative post Pay Level-14 or 14A, Minimum 2 years as HoD or Dean
qualification.details: Presently working Professor in NIT Raipur with not less than five years as Professor or experience in holding administrative post carrying Pay Level-14 or Level-14A, at least 2 years as HoD/Dean, sufficient contribution in academics, administration and outreach activities, eminent person with outstanding academic record.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nitrr.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Deputy Director Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.nitrr.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Raipur Deputy Director post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Deputy Director post at NIT Raipur is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy Director position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Professor with a minimum of 5 years of experience, experience in an administrative post at Pay Level-14 or 14A, and at least 2 years as Head of Department or Dean.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Deputy Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Director post is 62 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NIT Raipur Deputy Director post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Deputy Director recruitment at NIT Raipur.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Deputy Director post at NIT Raipur?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You should download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Deputy Director post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Deputy Director at the National Institute of Technology Raipur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of NIT Raipur?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology Raipur is www.nitrr.ac.in. You can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Deputy Director role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be conducted by a Selection Committee as per Statute 23 (5) (a).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is No./NITRR/R-1/2026/917.

faq.question: Q10. In which state and city is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh.
